product_overview: A React Native (Expo) frontend for managing student records with authentication, list viewing, search/sort, create/edit modals, and delete with optimistic updates. The app targets mobile and web and emphasizes robust error handling and accessible controls.
core_goals: Provide secure session-based authentication with session restore and logout.
Present a responsive, searchable, and sortable student list with robust loading and retry behavior.
Allow adding, editing, and deleting students with modal forms, validation, unsaved-change protection, and optimistic UI handling.
Gracefully handle API errors and provide clear retry/rollback behavior and user feedback.

features.name: Authentication Session
features.description: Users sign in, restore an existing session, and log out; handle invalid credentials and session restore failures.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter username in the username field. -> Enter password in the password field. -> Tap Sign In to authenticate. -> See dashboard at /students
Navigate to /login -> Enter username in the username field. -> Enter password in the password field. -> Tap Sign In to authenticate. -> See authentication error message and remain on /login
App launches (unauthenticated) -> Navigate to /login -> Tap Sign In with saved credentials -> GET /me succeeds and app navigates to /students
App launches (session restore attempt) -> GET /me fails with network or auth error -> See session restore error and remain on /login
Navigate to /students -> Tap Log Out from the dashboard. -> See /login

features.name: Student List Viewing
features.description: Display the students list with skeleton loading, pull-to-refresh, scroll, and retry after fetch errors.
user_flows: Navigate to /students -> View skeleton loading cards while data loads. -> See populated list of student cards after fetch succeeds. -> Scroll and inspect student cards. -> Pull to refresh -> See list refreshed
Navigate to /students -> View skeleton loading cards while data loads. -> See fetch error state with retry affordance. -> Tap retry -> See populated list of student cards
Navigate to /students -> Pull to refresh -> See loading state -> See refreshed list or an error message if refresh fails

features.name: Student Search and Sorting
features.description: Filter the student list by text search and cycle sort modes to reorder by name or rating in real time.
user_flows: Navigate to /students -> Type text into search input. -> Verify list updates in real time to match the query
Navigate to /students -> Tap sort button to cycle through sort modes. -> Verify list order updates to reflect the selected sort mode
Navigate to /students -> Type text into search input that matches no students. -> See empty state indicating no results. -> Clear search input -> Verify list repopulates

features.name: Student Create and Edit
features.description: Add and edit students using modal forms, with field validation, unsaved-change protection, and server error handling.
user_flows: Navigate to /students -> Tap Add Student to open the create modal. -> Fill first name field. -> Fill last name field. -> Fill rating field. -> Submit the form to create a student. -> See modal close and new student appear in the list
Navigate to /students -> Tap Add Student to open the create modal. -> Leave required fields blank. -> Submit the form to create a student. -> See validation errors and remain in modal

Navigate to /students -> Tap Add Student to open the create modal. -> Fill first name field. -> Attempt to close the modal without saving. -> See discard changes confirmation dialog. -> Choose Cancel to remain in the modal

Navigate to /students -> Tap Add Student to open the create modal. -> Fill first name field. -> Attempt to close the modal without saving. -> See discard changes confirmation dialog. -> Choose Discard to close the modal and discard changes

Navigate to /students -> Open edit on an existing student card. -> Modify first name and rating fields. -> Submit the form to update the student. -> See modal close and updated student values in the list
Navigate to /students -> Open edit on an existing student card. -> Modify fields. -> Submit the form to update the student. -> Receive server error -> See error message and remain in edit modal

features.name: Student Deletion
features.description: Delete student records via a confirmation dialog, with optimistic removal and rollback when the delete fails.
user_flows: Navigate to /students -> Tap delete action on a student card. -> See delete confirmation dialog. -> Confirm the delete. -> See student card removed and success feedback displayed
Navigate to /students -> Tap delete action on a student card. -> See delete confirmation dialog. -> Cancel the delete. -> See student card remains in the list

Navigate to /students -> Tap delete action on a student card. -> See delete confirmation dialog. -> Confirm the delete. -> Student card is removed optimistically. -> Server responds with an error. -> Student card is restored and an error message is shown

routes.description: Login screen shown when the session is not authenticated.
Student list dashboard with search, sorting, and CRUD modals.

features.name: Authentication Session
features.description: Users sign in, restore session state, and can log out.
user_interactions: Enter username in the username field.
Enter password in the password field.
Toggle show/hide password control.
Tap Sign In to authenticate.
Tap Log Out from the dashboard.

features.name: Student List Viewing
features.description: Display students, refresh the list, and handle loading/error states.
user_interactions: View skeleton loading cards while data loads.
Pull to refresh or tap refresh action.
Retry list loading after a fetch error.
Scroll and inspect student cards.

features.name: Student Search and Sorting
features.description: Filter and order the student list by name or rating.
user_interactions: Type text into search input.
Tap sort button to cycle through sort modes.
Verify list updates in real time.

features.name: Student Create and Edit
features.description: Add and edit students through modal forms with unsaved-change protection.
user_interactions: Tap Add Student to open the create modal.
Fill first name, last name, and rating fields.
Submit the form to create a student.
Open edit on an existing student and modify values.
Attempt to close dirty form and confirm discard dialog.

features.name: Student Deletion
features.description: Delete student records with confirmation and optimistic UI rollback on failure.
user_interactions: Tap delete action on a student card.
Confirm or cancel the delete confirmation dialog.
Observe success and rollback behavior on errors.

known_limitations.issue: App state controls screens without a dedicated router, so route-level deep-link coverage is limited.
known_limitations.impact: Automated navigation tests should model state transitions instead of URL route changes.

known_limitations.issue: Login credentials are expected from backend config and may disable login-specific generated tests when unavailable.
known_limitations.impact: Frontend test generation may skip authenticated scenarios unless credentials are configured.
